steps.title: Connect genres to readers
steps.content: The first sentence explains that Le Guin wrote both science fiction and fantasy. The second sentence says readers from both fan groups are among her audience. The transition should present that audience as a logical result of her work in both genres.

steps.title: Avoid contrast and timing
steps.content: A introduces an alternative, but no alternative is being offered. C signals contrast even though the second sentence follows naturally from the first. D supplies a time relationship that the sentence does not need. The answer is B.
